rewrite.text:
PROVE ex2: ∀ a b : nat, a <= b -> a <= S b
BEGIN
  ASSUME a : nat
  ASSUME b : nat
  ASSUME H : a <= b
  GOAL: a <= S b
  FACT h1: a <= b [BY H]
  FACT h2: a <= S b [BY le_n_S h1]
  THEREFORE a <= S b [BY h2]
  CONCLUDE: a <= S b [QED]
END
